CustomField.formula: IF(AND(SegmentIndex_Year__c = 1,OR(ISBLANK(SBQQ__RequiredBy__c),ISNULL(SBQQ__RequiredBy__c), ISPICKVAL( CPQ_Option_Type__c, 'Static Bundle')), OR( ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c, 'Software'), ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c, 'Software Discount (One-Time)'), ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c, 'Software Discount') )),TRUE,FALSE)
CustomField.label: Year 1 Sub Fees With Adj flag
